heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 80c–2 Authorization of appropriations
text: For fiscal year 1982, and for each of the three succeeding fiscal years, there are hereby authorized to be appropriated such amounts as may be necessary and appropriate to carry out the provisions and purposes of this chapter. Any sums so appropriated shall remain available until expended.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1981section 507 of Pub. L. 96–477section 80c of this title
